title: Ts@lelpowniy #6753
definition:
Hazelelponi = "facing the shade"

 1) sister of the sons of Etam in the genealogies of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hazelelponi = "facing the shade"

 1) sister of the sons of Etam in the genealogies of Judah

    NASB:  give shade, you who turn to me! an Isr. woman
